title: SolutionsRequest
description: Request body for POST /reports/solutions - AI-powered strategic advisory. Supports two modes: (1) token mode -- pass signal_token (required) and optionally scan_token; brand is inherited, standalone fields become optional supplemental context. (2) standalone mode -- provide brand and all business context fields directly. scan_token alone does not constitute token mode.

then.description: Standalone mode: when signal_token is absent, brand and all context fields are required. scan_token may be included for supplemental SEO context.

brand_slug.description: Existing brand slug (required for standalone mode)

brand_name.description: Brand name -- auto-creates brand_slug if not provided (required for standalone mode)

signal_token.description: Token from a completed Signal report (e.g. SIG-2025-11-XXXXX). When provided, brand is inherited and standalone fields become optional supplemental context.

scan_token.description: Token from a completed Scan report (e.g. SCN-2025-11-XXXXX). Feeds SEO/technical context into the analysis.

business_story.description: Tell us about your business (required for standalone mode)

decision.description: Key decision or challenge you're facing (required for standalone mode)

success.description: What does success look like? (required for standalone mode)

timeline.description: Timeline for decision (required for standalone mode)

scale_indicator.description: Business scale indicator, e.g. regional (required for standalone mode)

webhook_url.description: URL to receive completion webhook (HTTPS required)
